name: Lisas' List of Substitutions R-z
recipeIngredient: Shortening    1 cup = 1 cup butter or 1 cup margarine
Sour Cream    1 cup = 1 tablespoon white vinegar + enough milk to make 1 cup,
OR 6 ounces cream cheese with 3 tablespoons milk,
OR 1/3 cup melted butter with 3/4 cup sour milk -- for baking
recipeInstructions:
Sour Milk (1 Cup) = 1 tablespoon lemon juice or vinegar plus enough milk to make 1 cup
Brown Sugar   in baking = 1/2 cup white sugar + 2 tablespoons molasses
Tahini        ground sesame seeds
Tomatillos    fresh green tomatoes with lemon juice
Vanilla       almond extract
Vinegar       lemon juice in salads or cooking, malt vinegar
Wasabi        hot mustard powder mixed with water
Wine          for marinades = 1/4 cup vinegar + 1 tablespoon sugar + 1/4 cup water
Yeast         1 cake yeast = 2 envelopes dry or 2 tablespoons powdered,
OR 1 envelope dry yeast = 1 tablespoon powdered,
OR 1/2 cake of compressed yeast, crumbled
Yogurt        plain yogurt, sour cream, buttermilk, creme fraiche, heavy cream
